Container.Name: Plane AIO
Container.Overview: Run Plane, an open-source project and product-management platform, on Unraid with Plane's official all-in-one Docker image. This container bundles the Plane web app, API, live service, workers, proxy, and email intake services, but Plane still requires external PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, and S3-compatible object storage such as MinIO. Create those services separately before first start, then set DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, AMQP_URL, and the S3 variables below. For a simple LAN install, set Domain Name to your Unraid server IP or DNS name and set Web URL/CORS origins to the exact URL you will open, for example http://tower.local:8080 or http://192.168.1.10:8080. For production or public access, use a reverse proxy, HTTPS, strong unique secrets, and an external backup plan.
Container.Requires: Requires external PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, and S3-compatible storage (for example MinIO) containers or services.

Config.Name: Web UI HTTP
Config.Description: Plane HTTP web interface. Map to an unused Unraid host port such as 8080.

Config.Name: Web UI HTTPS
Config.Description: Optional Plane HTTPS port when SSL is configured inside the container. Many Unraid installs leave this disabled and use an external reverse proxy instead.

Config.Name: SMTP Port 25
Config.Description: Optional Plane intake email SMTP port 25 mapping.

Config.Name: SMTP Port 465
Config.Description: Optional Plane intake email SMTPS port 465 mapping.

Config.Name: SMTP Port 587
Config.Description: Optional Plane intake email submission port 587 mapping.

Config.Name: Logs
Config.Description: Persist Plane service logs.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persist Plane runtime data used by the all-in-one image.

Config.Name: Monitor DB
Config.Description: Persist Plane monitor/workspace license database state.

Config.Name: Email TLS Certificates
Config.Description: Optional TLS certificates for the built-in email intake service. Set TLS_CERT_PATH and TLS_PRIV_KEY_PATH when using this mount.

Config.Name: Domain Name
Config.Description: Primary domain name or IP address for this Plane instance, without protocol. For LAN-only usage this can be your Unraid server IP or DNS name.

Config.Name: Web URL
Config.Description: Complete base URL users will use to access Plane, including protocol and host port.

Config.Name: CORS Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated allowed browser origins. Usually this should match WEB_URL exactly.

Config.Name: Site Address
Config.Description: Caddy site address inside the AIO container. Leave :80 for HTTP behind Unraid port mapping or a reverse proxy.

Config.Name: App Protocol
Config.Description: Protocol used by Plane. Use http for LAN/reverse-proxy HTTP to the container; use https only when SSL is configured.

Config.Name: Trusted Proxies
Config.Description: CIDR ranges trusted for forwarded headers when behind a reverse proxy.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Run PostgreSQL separately and use host.docker.internal, the Unraid server IP, or a routable container hostname/IP.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Redis connection string for cache and sessions.

Config.Name: RabbitMQ URL
Config.Description: RabbitMQ AMQP connection string.

Config.Name: AWS Region
Config.Description: S3 region for object storage. For MinIO, us-east-1 is commonly accepted.

Config.Name: S3 Access Key
Config.Description: S3 or MinIO access key.

Config.Name: S3 Secret Key
Config.Description: S3 or MinIO secret key.

Config.Name: S3 Bucket
Config.Description: S3 or MinIO bucket name for Plane uploads.

Config.Name: S3 Endpoint URL
Config.Description: Endpoint URL for S3-compatible storage such as MinIO. Leave blank only when using AWS S3's standard endpoint.

Config.Name: File Size Limit
Config.Description: Maximum upload size in bytes. Default is 5 MiB.

Config.Name: Machine Signature
Config.Description: Optional unique instance identifier. Leave blank to let Plane generate one, or set a stable unique value before first start.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Django/JWT secret key. Set a long random value for production; Plane provides a default if omitted.

Config.Name: Live Server Secret Key
Config.Description: Secret used between API and live service. Set a long random value for production.

Config.Name: Silo HMAC Secret Key
Config.Description: Secret for Silo integration request authentication. Set a long random value for production.

Config.Name: AES Secret Key
Config.Description: Secret used to encrypt sensitive integration credentials at rest. Set a long random value for production.

Config.Name: Intake Email Domain
Config.Description: Optional domain for Plane intake email addresses, for example intake.example.com.

Config.Name: SMTP Domain
Config.Description: SMTP server bind/domain setting for Plane intake email.

Config.Name: TLS Certificate Path
Config.Description: Optional path inside the container to the email TLS certificate, such as /app/email/tls/fullchain.pem.

Config.Name: TLS Private Key Path
Config.Description: Optional path inside the container to the email TLS private key, such as /app/email/tls/privkey.pem.

Config.Name: GitHub Client ID
Config.Description: Optional GitHub OAuth integration client ID.

Config.Name: GitHub Client Secret
Config.Description: Optional GitHub OAuth integration client secret.

Config.Name: Slack Client ID
Config.Description: Optional Slack integration client ID.

Config.Name: Slack Client Secret
Config.Description: Optional Slack integration client secret.

Config.Name: GitLab Client ID
Config.Description: Optional GitLab integration client ID.

Config.Name: GitLab Client Secret
Config.Description: Optional GitLab integration client secret.
